channel.title: Docs on theplaybook
channel.description: Recent content in Docs on theplaybook

item.title: King's County Housing Sales Dashboard
item.description: Introduction This is a test page created with Hugo. You can add your content here using Markdown syntax. Section 1 Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. item.title: Deploying a Blog Powered by Hugo to Github Pages w/ Custom Domain via Github Actions
item.description:
This post provides a step-by-step guide on how you can create this blog powered by Hugo, configure Github Actions to publish to Github Pages, and link custom domain to your Github Pages.

This guide is also available on Youtube here.
